azure/model_router.comment: Flat cost of $0.14 per M input tokens for Azure AI Foundry Model Router infrastructure. Use pattern: azure_ai/model_router/<deployment-name> where deployment-name is your Azure deployment (e.g., azure-model-router)

metadata.notes: Anthropic via Invoke route does not currently support pdf input.
